name: amazon-seller-mcp
description: Amazon seller tools for FBA fee calculation, inventory optimization, and restock recommendations via the SP-API.

tools.name: calculate_fba_fees
tools.description: Calculate FBA fees for a product including storage, fulfillment, and referral fees

tools.name: get_inventory_status
tools.description: Get current inventory levels and health metrics

tools.name: get_restock_recommendations
tools.description: Get AI-powered restock recommendations based on sales velocity

tools.name: analyze_profitability
tools.description: Analyze product profitability including all Amazon fees
